title: December 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 10''' is the 344th day (345th in leap years) of the year. There are 21 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Ron Frazier]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Fionnula Flanagan]] is born.
*1941 – [[Peter Michael Goetz]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Gregg Berger]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Scott Capurro]] is born.
*[[1996]] – Conclusion of ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|Return of the Jedi]]'': "[[Blood of a Jedi]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 14|''Empire'' 14]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[The Clone Wars 3|''The Clone Wars'' 3]] published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – ''[[Timeline 11: Rebirth of the Sith Empire]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 146|''Star Wars Insider'' 146]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Visions and Voices]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' shorts "[[The Search for Kaz]]," "[[Dart and Cover]]" and "[[Neeku's Reward]]" are released on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 6 — Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Kathleen Kennedy]] announces 10 new Star Wars projects at ''Disney Investor Day 2020.''
*[[2024]] – "[[Very Interesting, As an Astrogation Problem]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Star Wars Insider 229|''Star Wars Insider'' 229]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon 4|''Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker 4|''Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[Tales From the Nightlands 3|''Tales From the Nightlands'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[Jim Ward (voice actor)|Jim Ward]] dies.
<noinclude>
